name: FRANKLIN STREET PROPERTIES CORP /MA/
business: Franklin Street Properties Corp. operates as a real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on commercial real estate investments primarily in office markets. The company derives revenue from rental income from real estate leasing, property dispositions, and fee income from asset/property management and development.
sellsTo: Office tenants in commercial real estate markets

exposures.sentence: As of December 31, 2025, approximately 25% and 10% of our tenants as a percentage of the total rentable square feet operated in the energy services industry and the professional services industry, respectively.

catalysts.event: Strategic review process initiated by Board of Directors to explore ways to maximize shareholder value; review is ongoing as of filing date.
catalysts.sentence: In May 2025, we announced that our Board of Directors had initiated a review of strategic alternatives in order to explore ways to maximize shareholder value.

catalysts.event: Board of Directors determined to suspend quarterly cash dividends in March 2026.
catalysts.sentence: In March 2026, our Board of Directors determined to suspend quarterly cash dividends to reduce operating expenses and to redeploy that capital into leasing efforts intended to enhance the value of our portfolio.
